record_types.name: SCB_FPCCR_Register
SCB_MVFR0_Register

variables.name: FPCAR
variables.code:
FPCAR  : System.Storage_Elements.Integer_Address
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_EF38#);

variables.name: FPCCR
variables.code:
FPCCR  : SCB_FPCCR_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_EF34#);

variables.name: MVFR0
variables.code:
MVFR0  : SCB_MVFR0_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_EF40#);
